description_long: This is a modern wooden computer desk with a multi-level design, featuring a main rectangular work surface and an elevated circular platform supported by metal rods, likely intended for a monitor or decorative items. On the left side, there is a vertical rack suitable for storing books, files, or computer accessories, and a lower shelf beneath it. The right side of the desk includes a spacious drawer with a visible handle, providing enclosed storage, and an open shelf above it for additional items. The desk incorporates a pull-out keyboard tray beneath the main surface, supported by metal brackets. The overall construction combines warm wood tones with metallic accents, giving it a contemporary and functional appearance suitable for urban offices, home workspaces, or public study areas.
description: A contemporary wooden computer desk with a pull-out keyboard tray, elevated monitor shelf, side drawer, and open shelving, accented by metal supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, pull-out keyboard tray, left-side vertical rack, and right-side drawer with handle.
description_view_1: Side view from the right, highlighting the depth of the drawer, the open shelf above it, and the elevated circular platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels, the open structure of the left rack, and the overall width of the desk.
description_view_3: Side view from the left, focusing on the vertical rack, lower shelf, and the layered design of the work surfaces.
